subcodes.first_line: All things bear witness to their powerlessness to engage in remembrance and utterance, and the Kingdom of Names to its inability to attain true knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یشهد کل الاشیاء بعجزه عن الذکر و البیان و ملکوت الاسماء بقصوره عن العرفان
subcodes.subjects: @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for protection
